title: 6pcs Candle Holders Votive, Gold Glass Tea Light Holders Bulk for Weddings, Events, Table Centrepiece, Christmas, Valentine, and Party and Holiday Decorations (gold-6)
features: VOTIVE CANDLE HOLDERS: Each of the mercury glass votive candle holders has 2.12ʺ diameter (top) and 2.56ʺ height. Works with regular votive candles, tealight candles and flameless LED tea light candles.

PERFECT FOR WEDDING DECORATION: Gold votive candle holders are going to go so beautifully with the elegant wedding party theme, the little details in the glass reflect on the flame, making them look sparkly and will brighten up your wedding scene too. They will be the perfect choice for each wedding party centrepiece.
MERCURY GLASS VOTIVES: Mercury speckled effect on the gold votive candle holders will enhance the natural warm light of votive candles, giving it a vintage but timeless look.

SAFE FOR DISHWASHER: Each gold candle holder features a thick glass wall and weighted base to prevent it from overheating or cracking, spread a heartfelt golden light through your life for a very long time.

SUITABLE FOR VARIOUS OCCASIONS: Whether it is a dining table or a shelf, whether it is a window sill or a mantel, they are the most eye-catching items. They are also suitable for various festival and party decor and gift giving, like Christmas, Thanksgiving, Halloween, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, birthday parties, dinner rehearsals, baby shower, wedding shower.
